creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text: Here's a patch which allows groups that customize the ports tree to install OpenSSL to a non-standard --prefix, making it possible for the projects to have openssl=base and openssl!=base coexist without having to change everything "under the sun", as it were: https://gist.github.com/ngie-eign/b4b34ff3739c6a7c3ec2e2322737266c .
